TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for ANI:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the ANI:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Ani Monthly Switch Backup:- 10.5.5.206
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed ANI 10.5.5.206 switch using putty and performed configuration backup. placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network- config-Switch folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches- ANI-HQ-VBR-02, ANI-HQ-VONE, VMANIDC02, VMANIFS-01.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the MYRMM portal and then worked on the following machine. Download and install all pending updates on the machine. After that verify all the machines are up and working fine.

ANI-HQ-VBR-02, ANI-HQ-VONE, VMANIDC02, VMANIFS-01.

TimeEntry.Title: Worked on the failed patches computer (ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01, ANI-HQ-WINEDGE & ANI-HQ-VONE)
TimeEntry.Notes:
After reviewing the management portal, it has been identified that the following systems require manual updates:

ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01, ANI-HQ-WINEDGE & ANI-HQ-VONE

The following components need to be manually uploaded and installed:

  • Cisco Secure Client – AnyConnect VPN (5.1.16.194) – Manual installation required
  • Cisco Secure Client Diagnostics and Reporting Tool (5.1.16.194) – Manual installation required

Remote access will be used to download and install the required setup files on the affected systems. Once the installation is completed, a scan will be initiated through the management portal to verify that the systems reflect the latest version

TimeEntry.Title: Setup Veeam Agent for Microsoft on VMANIFS-01 and VMANIFS1.
TimeEntry.Notes: Loged into QNAP and then fix the issue with QNAP access and setup S3. Backup for servers. Once the issue has been resolved then resetup the backup job and complete that successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: WS-AI-29 : Label printer setup
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed the machine and identified that the printer was connected to the network via LAN, while the PC was on Wi-Fi. To establish communication, first located the printer’s IP address and used it to verify network connectivity from the PC. Once connectivity was confirmed, proceeded to identify the correct printer driver compatible with the device. After obtaining the appropriate driver, installed and configured it using the printer’s IP address. Finally, performed a test print to ensure the printer was functioning correctly and the setup was successful.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Vmanits1, VMANI-SDDJ, VMANIFS-02 : Found critical alert for these machines in OPSPROB
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed the device details and identified the root cause as incorrectly configured WMI credentials, which prevented the machines from syncing with Ops Manager and caused them to appear offline. Updated the machines with the correct credentials and re-added them to the system. They are now successfully syncing, showing as online, and no longer generating alarms in Ops Manager.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for ANI:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the ANI:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Network Detective scan report submission
TimeEntry.Notes: I started a Network Detective scan and completed it. The results were also uploaded to the Teams channel.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches- ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01, ANI-HQ-SQL-01, ANI-HQ-VBR-02, ANI-HQ-VONE.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the MYRMM portal and then worked on the following machine. Download and install all pending updates on the machine. After that verify all the machines are up and working fine.

ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01, ANI-HQ-SQL-01, ANI-HQ-VBR-02, ANI-HQ-VONE.

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches- VMANIDC02, VMANIFS-01, VMANIFS-02, VMANIFS1.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the MYRMM portal and then worked on the following machine. Download and install all pending updates on the machine. After that verify all the machines are up and working fine.

VMANIDC02, VMANIFS-01, VMANIFS-02, VMANIFS1.

TimeEntry.Title: QNAP firmware 5.2.9.3451 upgrade for ANI
TimeEntry.Notes: I logged into the QNAP system in the ANI environment and found that firmware updates were pending. Before proceeding with the update, I verified that all backup jobs had completed successfully. Since a reboot was required prior to installing the firmware, I rebooted the QNAP device, installed the updates, and then performed a second reboot to finalise the installation. After the system came back online, I verified that all shared folders were accessible. I then re-scanned the backup repository, and the scan completed successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: ANI had a power outage
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per the call received from Rishad, there was a power outage at ANI, which caused multiple virtual machines to go down.
Connected to the environment via a VM and logged into both ESXi hosts. Powered on all virtual machines and configured auto-start settings for all VMs on both ESXi servers to prevent the issue in the future.
Verified services on several servers. Identified 28 virtual machines that were still experiencing network-related issues. Connected to each affected VM and configured the network settings. After configuration, IIS services were verified and confirmed to be up and running. Access to the servers was validated using ScreenConnect.
Later, Rishad called again reporting an issue with the Global Shop application. Troubleshot the issue and resolved it by correcting the DNS entries. After the fix, the application was tested and confirmed to be working fine. All systems and services are now up and running without issues.

TimeEntry.Title: server down
TimeEntry.Notes: Servers went down, bought the servers with the assistance of gurdeep.

TimeEntry.Title: ANI had a power outage
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into all the ANI server, checked the services and the shared drives.

Wherever required enabled the services and checked the functioning of the shared drives from my computers.

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Secure Client Manual Update Required on ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01, ANI-HQ-WINEDGE & ANI-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes:
Subject: Cisco Secure Client Manual Update Required on ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01, ANI-HQ-WINEDGE & ANI-HQ-VONE

After reviewing the management portal, it has been identified that the following systems require manual updates:

ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01, ANI-HQ-WINEDGE & ANI-HQ-VONE

The following components need to be manually uploaded and installed:

  • Cisco Secure Client – AnyConnect VPN (5.1.16.194) – Manual installation required
  • Cisco Secure Client Diagnostics and Reporting Tool (5.1.16.194) – Manual installation required

Remote access will be used to download and install the required setup files on the affected systems. Once the installation is completed, a scan will be initiated through the management portal to verify that the systems reflect the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - ANI-HQ-VBR-02, ANI-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the following servers are on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.ANI-HQ-VBR-02,  ANI-HQ-VONE

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - ANI-HQ-VBR-02, VMANIDC02, VMANIFS-01, VMANIFS-02.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged in to vCenter and found the following servers are on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

ANI-HQ-VBR-02, VMANIDC02, VMANIFS-01, VMANIFS-02.

TimeEntry.Title: ANI Firewall weekly configuration backup is successfully done for 19-04-2026
TimeEntry.Notes: ANI Firewall weekly configuration backup is successfully done for 19-04-2026

TimeEntry.Title: Servers Reboot Required:-ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01,ANI-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes: While monitoring the Manage Engine Portal, Found the below-mentioned Server that needed to reboot, so restarted all the server, The Server came online and verified all the automatic services are running fine on servers. "Restart" Process initiated successfully 'It has been synced with the portal. hence closing this ticket. Server are:- ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01,ANI-HQ-VONE

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version ( 7.36.20805.0) updated on ,ANDERSEN-AITS,ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-0,ANI-HQ-VBR-02 & ANI-HQ-SQL-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed the CrowdStrike portal and identified that ,ANDERSEN-AITS,ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-0,ANI-HQ-VBR-02 & ANI-HQ-SQL-01 required an update to the latest version. Subsequently, I updated both to version  7.36.20805.0

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade VMWare tools - ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01, ANI-HQ-SQL-01, ANI-HQ-VBR-02, VMANIFS-01, VMANIFS1.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the vCenter and check the following machines needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.

ANI-HQ-OPSPRB-01, ANI-HQ-SQL-01, ANI-HQ-VBR-02, VMANIFS-01, VMANIFS1.
